creator: ygy@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #1)

Proposed commit msg:

sysutils/py-diffoscope: Update to 187

Changes: https://diffoscope.org/news/diffoscope-187-released/

PR: XXXXXX
Approved by: koobs (maintainer)
(MFH: 2021Q4 (reason) if needed)

Further commit messages will be very similar, so I will skip that, but will keep the URL field of the PR updated.

I would still appreciate explicit approvals (maintainer-feedback (+)) from the maintainer as it is the standard policy. Thank you!
